name: Lawmadi OS
description: 법마디(Lawmadi) OS — Korean Legal AI with 60 specialized agents and real-time statute verification via law.go.kr. Free: 2 queries/day. Korean & English.

auth.description: Optional. Without auth: 2 free queries/day (rate-limited). With 'Bearer <API_KEY>': unlimited.

tools.name: ask_ask_post
tools.title: Ask Legal Question
tools.description: Submit a Korean legal question. Routes to the most relevant specialist among 60 legal domain leaders. Returns verified legal analysis with statute citations.

query.description: Legal question in Korean or English (max 2000 chars)

tools.name: ask_stream_ask_stream_post
tools.title: Ask Legal Question (SSE Stream)
tools.description: Streaming version of legal question — returns SSE events for real-time display.

tools.name: ask_expert_ask_expert_post
tools.title: Expert Legal Analysis
tools.description: Deep 4-stage expert analysis with full statute verification (credits required).

query.description: Legal question for expert analysis (max 2000 chars)

tools.name: get_leaders_api_leaders_get
tools.title: List Legal Agents
tools.description: Get all 60 legal specialist agents with name, specialty, description, and ID.

tools.name: chat_leader_api_chat_leader_post
tools.title: Chat with Legal Agent
tools.description: Direct chat with a specific legal agent by leader ID.

query.description: Question for the specific leader (max 2000 chars)

tools.name: search_search_get
tools.title: Search Korean Law
tools.description: Search Korean statutes and legal provisions via law.go.kr.

tools.name: suggest_questions_suggest_questions_post
tools.title: Suggest Follow-up Questions
tools.description: Generate 3 contextual follow-up questions based on current query and leader specialty.

prompts.name: legal_question
prompts.description: Ask a Korean legal question — routed to the best specialist among 60 agents

prompts.name: expert_analysis
prompts.description: Deep 4-stage expert legal analysis with full statute verification

prompts.name: find_specialist
prompts.description: Find the right legal specialist for your situation

resources.name: About Lawmadi OS
resources.description: Overview of the Korean Legal AI service
